aronui.when_to_use: List all automation tasks that are deleted but recoverable (in trash).
aronui.output_shape: Formatted string listing each deleted automation task with its name, ID, schedule, and instructions to restore.

pitfalls.text: No required arguments; empty object {} works without error.
Extra parameters like {'invalid_param': 'test'} are ignored (no error).
Passing null or a string instead of object also succeeds (tool is lenient, no error thrown).

procedure: Call the tool with an empty object {} (or any value, as the tool ignores input).
The tool returns a formatted list of deleted automations if any exist.
verification: Check that the output begins with '🗑️ Deleted Automations (in Trash):'
Verify each listed item includes name, ID, schedule, and restore instructions.
If no automations are in trash, output should indicate empty list (though not observed, assume).

predict_records.predicted: success: The tool should return a list of deleted automation tasks (or an empty list if none exist).
